case_title: SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INC. VS. AMALLIO PAVEL et al

docket_entries.description: MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT BY POSTING AND MAILING
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INC. SERVED AUG-30-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAVEL, AMALLIO DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 OAK STREET (TOP FLOOR) SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, LOCATED IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INC.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED BY MAIL AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INC. SERVED AUG-30-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAVEL, AMALLIO
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $0.00 IS THE DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAVEL, AMALLIO DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST MORTGAGE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PAVEL, AMALLIO DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PAVEL, AMALLIO DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
